description: A hollow metal object that rings when struck; instrument of calling and awareness. 'Teli' names what calls to presence—the clear monae that awakens attention.
sound_symbolism: The word rings clear. 'Te' taps with sharp contact, striker meeting metal. Then 'li' rings bright and clear, monae spreading.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'lo teli' (the bell). For mindfulness bells, church bells, door bells—any ringing caller.

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Bell as awakener—the mindfulness bell calls attention to present moment, interrupting distraction.
pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Bells organized community—calling to worship, marking time, warning of danger.
